subcodes.first_line: By the testimony of all the divine Books, this blessed Day hath been adorned with the ornament of distinction and hath been designated as the Day of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بشهادت جمیع کتب الهی این یوم مبارک بطراز تخصیص مزین گشته و بیوم الله موسوم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
